requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — Household Refrigerating Appliances (PS/IEC 60335-2-24, 230 V / 50 Hz)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——家用制冷器具（PS/IEC 60335-2-24，230 V / 50 Hz）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——家用製冷器具（PS/IEC 60335-2-24，230 V / 50 Hz）

summary.en: Household refrigerating appliances imported into Pakistan must meet the electrical-safety standard that the Pakistan Standards and Quality Control Authority (PSQCA) has adopted from the IEC 60335 series. The product-specific standard is the Pakistan Standard adopting IEC 60335-2-24 (Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Part 2-24: Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers), read together with the Pakistan Standard adopting the general standard IEC 60335-1. Appliances are designed for Pakistan's single-phase domestic grid of 230 V, 50 Hz. Key requirements cover protection against electric shock, insulation resistance and dielectric strength, thermal cut-outs, creepage and clearance distances, mechanical strength of the housing, earthing continuity, and appliance markings. Where the product falls under PSQCA's Conformity Assessment list, conformity to the adopted PS/IEC standard is demonstrated through PSQCA's certification/marking route before the goods are released by customs.
summary.zh: 进口至巴基斯坦的家用制冷器具须符合巴基斯坦标准与质量控制局（PSQCA）从IEC 60335系列采用的电气安全标准。适用的产品专项标准为采用IEC 60335-2-24的巴基斯坦标准（家用和类似用途电器的安全——第2-24部分：制冷器具、冰淇淋器具和制冰机的特殊要求），须与采用通用标准IEC 60335-1的巴基斯坦标准结合使用。器具按巴基斯坦单相家用电网230 V、50 Hz设计。核心要求涵盖防触电保护、绝缘电阻与介电强度、热断路器、爬电距离与电气间隙、外壳机械强度、接地连续性及器具标识。若产品列入PSQCA合格评定清单，须在海关放行前通过PSQCA认证/标识路径证明符合所采用的PS/IEC标准。
summary.zht: 進口至巴基斯坦的家用製冷器具須符合巴基斯坦標準與質量控制局（PSQCA）從IEC 60335系列採用的電氣安全標準。適用的產品專項標準為採用IEC 60335-2-24的巴基斯坦標準（家用和類似用途電器的安全——第2-24部分：製冷器具、冰淇淋器具和製冰機的特殊要求），須與採用通用標準IEC 60335-1的巴基斯坦標準結合使用。器具按巴基斯坦單相家用電網230 V、50 Hz設計。核心要求涵蓋防觸電保護、絕緣電阻與介電強度、熱斷路器、爬電距離與電氣間隙、外殼機械強度、接地連續性及器具標識。若產品列入PSQCA合格評定清單，須在海關放行前通過PSQCA認證/標識路徑證明符合所採用的PS/IEC標準。

standards_or_laws: Pakistan Standard adopting IEC 60335-2-24 — Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Part 2-24: Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers (administered by PSQCA)
Pakistan Standard adopting IEC 60335-1 — General requirements (read in conjunction with the Part 2-24 adoption)
PSQCA Act, 1996 — legal basis for mandatory standards and the PS Conformity Assessment / marking scheme
Grid reference: 230 V, 50 Hz single-phase domestic supply (Pakistan)

summary.en: China's mandatory safety standard for household refrigerating appliances is GB 4706.13-2014 (Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers), technically derived from IEC 60335-2-24:2010 with Chinese national deviations, read with GB 4706.1-2005 (general requirements). It is mandatory and enforced by SAMR under the China Compulsory Certification (CCC) regime; products must be CCC-certified by a CNCA-designated body before sale in China and are designed for China's 220 V / 50 Hz domestic supply. Because both China's GB 4706.13 and Pakistan's adopted PS standard trace to IEC 60335-2-24, the technical baseline overlaps, but a Chinese CCC certificate/test report is not automatically accepted by PSQCA — Pakistan requires conformity demonstrated through its own PS marking/certification route.
summary.zh: 中国家用制冷器具的强制性安全标准为GB 4706.13-2014（家用和类似用途电器的安全——制冷器具、冰淇淋器具和制冰机的特殊要求），技术上源自IEC 60335-2-24:2010并含中国国家偏差，须与GB 4706.1-2005（通用要求）结合使用。该标准为强制性，由市场监管总局（SAMR）通过中国强制认证（CCC）制度执行；产品须经CNCA指定机构完成CCC认证方可在中国销售，并按中国220 V / 50 Hz家用电源设计。由于中国GB 4706.13与巴基斯坦采用的PS标准均溯源至IEC 60335-2-24，技术基线存在重叠，但中国CCC证书/检测报告不被PSQCA自动接受——巴基斯坦要求通过其自身PS标识/认证路径证明合格。
summary.zht: 中國家用製冷器具的強制性安全標準為GB 4706.13-2014（家用和類似用途電器的安全——製冷器具、冰淇淋器具和製冰機的特殊要求），技術上源自IEC 60335-2-24:2010並含中國國家偏差，須與GB 4706.1-2005（通用要求）結合使用。該標準為強制性，由市場監管總局（SAMR）通過中國強制認證（CCC）制度執行；產品須經CNCA指定機構完成CCC認證方可在中國銷售，並按中國220 V / 50 Hz家用電源設計。由於中國GB 4706.13與巴基斯坦採用的PS標準均溯源至IEC 60335-2-24，技術基線存在重疊，但中國CCC證書/檢測報告不被PSQCA自動接受——巴基斯坦要求通過其自身PS標識/認證路徑證明合格。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13-2014 — Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers (mandatory; derived from IEC 60335-2-24:2010 with national deviations; enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA)
GB 4706.1-2005 — General requirements (read in conjunction with GB 4706.13)

gap.en: Although both China's GB 4706.13 and Pakistan's adopted PS standard derive from IEC 60335-2-24, the exporter cannot simply present its Chinese CCC certificate. Key gaps: (1) Conformity route — where refrigerators fall under PSQCA's Conformity Assessment list, conformity must be demonstrated through PSQCA's own certification/marking process; a Chinese CCC certificate is not accepted as equivalent without PSQCA acceptance. (2) Test-report acceptance — PSQCA may accept test reports from accredited (ILAC MRA / IECEE CB) laboratories covering the relevant IEC 60335-2-24 / IEC 60335-1 clauses, which can reduce re-testing; the exporter should confirm with PSQCA or its importer whether existing CB-Scheme reports are accepted and whether any Pakistan national deviations apply. (3) Voltage/marking — appliances and rating plates must reflect 230 V / 50 Hz operation; Chinese 220 V rating plates and Chinese-language markings must be reviewed/adapted. (4) Plug/socket — domestic markings and instructions should reflect Pakistan installation practice. Exporters should verify the current PS standard reference and edition with PSQCA before shipment.
gap.zh: 尽管中国GB 4706.13与巴基斯坦采用的PS标准均源自IEC 60335-2-24，出口商不能仅凭中国CCC证书。主要差距：（1）合格评定路径——若电冰箱列入PSQCA合格评定清单，须通过PSQCA自身的认证/标识流程证明合格；中国CCC证书未经PSQCA认可不被接受为等效。（2）检测报告接受度——PSQCA可能接受由认可（ILAC MRA / IECEE CB）实验室出具、涵盖相关IEC 60335-2-24 / IEC 60335-1条款的检测报告，从而减少重新检测；出口商应向PSQCA或其进口商确认现有CB体系报告是否被接受，以及是否存在巴基斯坦国家偏差。（3）电压/标识——器具及铭牌须反映230 V / 50 Hz运行；中国220 V铭牌及中文标识须审查/调整。（4）插头/插座——家用标识及说明书应反映巴基斯坦安装惯例。出口商应在出货前向PSQCA核实现行PS标准引用及版本。
gap.zht: 儘管中國GB 4706.13與巴基斯坦採用的PS標準均源自IEC 60335-2-24，出口商不能僅憑中國CCC證書。主要差距：（1）合格評定路徑——若電冰箱列入PSQCA合格評定清單，須通過PSQCA自身的認證/標識流程證明合格；中國CCC證書未經PSQCA認可不被接受為等效。（2）檢測報告接受度——PSQCA可能接受由認可（ILAC MRA / IECEE CB）實驗室出具、涵蓋相關IEC 60335-2-24 / IEC 60335-1條款的檢測報告，從而減少重新檢測；出口商應向PSQCA或其進口商確認現有CB體系報告是否被接受，以及是否存在巴基斯坦國家偏差。（3）電壓/標識——器具及銘牌須反映230 V / 50 Hz運行；中國220 V銘牌及中文標識須審查/調整。（4）插頭/插座——家用標識及說明書應反映巴基斯坦安裝慣例。出口商應在出貨前向PSQCA核實現行PS標準引用及版本。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where listed — for refrigerators under PSQCA's Conformity Assessment list, conformity to the adopted PS/IEC 60335-2-24 standard and PSQCA certification/marking is required before customs release; administered by PSQCA under the PSQCA Act, 1996
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification required under GB 4706.13-2014 before sale in China; administered by SAMR/CNCA

source.publisher: Pakistan Standards and Quality Control Authority (PSQCA)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Electrical safety to the Pakistan Standard adopting IEC 60335-2-24 (with IEC 60335-1) is the applicable baseline for household refrigerating appliances; where the product is on PSQCA's Conformity Assessment list, PSQCA certification/marking is required before market entry. Chinese CCC certification to GB 4706.13 is not automatically accepted. ILAC MRA / IECEE CB test reports covering the relevant IEC 60335-2-24 clauses may reduce re-testing — confirm acceptance and any Pakistan deviations with PSQCA. Rating plates must reflect 230 V / 50 Hz.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 符合采用IEC 60335-2-24（配合IEC 60335-1）的巴基斯坦标准的电气安全是家用制冷器具的适用基线；若产品列入PSQCA合格评定清单，须在进入市场前取得PSQCA认证/标识。中国依据GB 4706.13的CCC认证不被自动接受。涵盖相关IEC 60335-2-24条款的ILAC MRA / IECEE CB检测报告或可减少重新检测——请向PSQCA确认接受度及巴基斯坦偏差。铭牌须反映230 V / 50 Hz。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 符合採用IEC 60335-2-24（配合IEC 60335-1）的巴基斯坦標準的電氣安全是家用製冷器具的適用基線；若產品列入PSQCA合格評定清單，須在進入市場前取得PSQCA認證/標識。中國依據GB 4706.13的CCC認證不被自動接受。涵蓋相關IEC 60335-2-24條款的ILAC MRA / IECEE CB檢測報告或可減少重新檢測——請向PSQCA確認接受度及巴基斯坦偏差。銘牌須反映230 V / 50 Hz。
